title: ceratostylis javanica
intro: Ceratostylis javanica, also known as Javanese orchid, is a species of orchid native to Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis javanica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of Ceratostylis javanica can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
